revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 21 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 21 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月21日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[1180年]]_月_日） - [[源頼朝]]と[[源義経]]の兄弟が駿河国の黄瀬川で初めての対面 * [[貞和]]元年/[[興国]]6年（[[1345年]]_月_日） - 北朝が貞和に改元 * [[寛政]]12年（[[1800年]]_月_日） - [[伊能忠敬]]が[[蝦夷]]地・[[奥州街道]]の測量を終えて江戸に帰着。12月に略測図を幕府に上呈 * [[安政]]4年（[[1857年]]_月_日） - アメリカ総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]が江戸城に登城し[[徳川家定]]と会見
== 誕生日 == * （[[852年]]_月_日） - [[朱全忠]]、五代[[後梁]]の初代皇帝（+ [[912年]]） * [[貞享]]元年（[[1684年]][[11月27日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]、[[江戸幕府]]8代将軍・5代[[紀伊藩]]主（+ [[1751年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文政]]元年（[[1818年]]_月_日） - [[司馬江漢]]、洋画家（* [[1738年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月20日 (旧暦)|10月20日]] 翌日[[10月22日 (旧暦)|10月22日]] - 前月[[9月21日 (旧暦)|9月21日]] 翌月[[11月21日 (旧暦)|11月21日]] *新暦[[10月21日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[11月10日]]） - [[源頼朝]]と[[源義経]]の兄弟が[[駿河国]]の黄瀬川で初めての対面 * [[貞和]]元年/[[興国]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1345年]][[11月15日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[康永]]から貞和に[[改元]] * [[寛政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1800年]][[12月7日]]） - [[伊能忠敬]]が[[蝦夷地]]・[[奥州街道]]の測量を終えて江戸に帰着。12月に略測図を幕府に上呈 * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[12月7日]]） - アメリカ総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]が[[江戸城]]に登城し[[徳川家定]]と会見
== 誕生日 == * [[大中]]6年（ユリウス暦[[852年]][[12月5日]]） - [[朱全忠]]、五代[[後梁]]の初代[[皇帝]]（+ [[912年]]） * [[貞享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1684年]][[11月27日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]、[[江戸幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]・5代[[紀伊藩]]主（+ [[1751年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]17年（[[1612年]][[11月13日]]） - [[伊東マンショ]]、[[天正遣欧少年使節]]正使（* [[1569年]]?） * [[享保]]11年（[[1726年]][[11月14日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（* [[1676年]]） * [[文政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1818年]][[11月19日]]） - [[司馬江漢]]、[[洋画家]]（* [[1738年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|20|10|22|9|21|11|10|1021}}

== 誕生日 == * [[大中]]6年（ユリウス暦[[852年]][[12月5日]]） - [[朱全忠]]、五代[[後梁]]の初代[[皇帝]]（+ [[912年]]） * [[貞享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1684年]][[11月27日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]、[[江戸幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]・5代[[紀伊藩]]主（+ [[1751年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[11月13日]]） - [[伊東マンショ]]、[[天正遣欧少年使節]]正使（* [[1569年]]?） * [[享保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1726年]][[11月14日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（* [[1676年]]） * [[文政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1818年]][[11月19日]]） - [[司馬江漢]]、[[洋画家]]（* [[1738年]]） * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[11月21日]]） - [[酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|酒井忠良]]、[[伊勢崎藩]]主（* [[1808年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[11月13日]]） - [[伊東マンショ]]、[[天正遣欧少年使節]]正使（* [[1569年]]?） * [[享保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1726年]][[11月14日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（* [[1676年]]） * [[文政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1818年]][[11月19日]]） - [[司馬江漢]]、[[洋画家]]（* [[1738年]]） * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[11月21日]]） - [[酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|酒井忠良]]、[[伊勢崎藩]]主（* [[1808年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 誕生日 == * [[大中]]6年（ユリウス暦[[852年]][[12月5日]]） - [[朱全忠]]、五代[[後梁]]の初代[[皇帝]]（+ [[912年]]） * [[貞享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1684年]][[11月27日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]、[[江戸幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]・5代[[紀伊藩]]主（+ [[1751年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[11月13日]]） - [[伊東マンショ]]、[[天正遣欧少年使節]]正使（* [[1569年]]?） * [[享保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1726年]][[11月14日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（* [[1676年]]） * [[文政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1818年]][[11月19日]]） - [[司馬江漢]]、[[洋画家]]（* [[1738年]]） * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[11月21日]]） - [[酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|酒井忠良]]、[[伊勢崎藩]]主（* [[1808年]]）

== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[11月10日]]） - [[源頼朝]]と[[源義経]]の兄弟が[[駿河国]]の黄瀬川で初めての対面{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[貞和]]元年/[[興国]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1345年]][[11月15日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[康永]]から貞和に[[改元]] * [[寛政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1800年]][[12月7日]]） - [[伊能忠敬]]が[[蝦夷地]]・[[奥州街道]]の測量を終えて江戸に帰着。12月に略測図を幕府に上呈 * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[12月7日]]） - アメリカ総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]が[[江戸城]]に登城し[[徳川家定]]と会見
== 誕生日 == * [[大中]]6年（ユリウス暦[[852年]][[12月5日]]） - [[朱全忠]]、五代[[後梁]]の初代[[皇帝]]（+ [[912年]]） * [[貞享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1684年]][[11月27日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]、[[江戸幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]・5代[[紀伊藩]]主（+ [[1751年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[11月13日]]） - [[伊東マンショ]]、[[天正遣欧少年使節]]正使（* [[1569年]]?） * [[享保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1726年]][[11月14日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（* [[1676年]]） * [[文政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1818年]][[11月19日]]） - [[司馬江漢]]、[[洋画家]]（* [[1738年]]） * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[11月21日]]） - [[酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|酒井忠良]]、[[伊勢崎藩]]主（* [[1808年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|20|10|22|9|21|11|10|1021}}
[[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar October]]

--> == Events == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[11月10日]]） - [[源頼朝]]と[[源義経]]の兄弟が[[駿河国]]の黄瀬川で初めての対面{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[貞和]]元年/[[興国]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1345年]][[11月15日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[康永]]から貞和に[[改元]] * [[寛政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1800年]][[12月7日]]） - [[伊能忠敬]]が[[蝦夷地]]・[[奥州街道]]の測量を終えて江戸に帰着。12月に略測図を幕府に上呈 * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[12月7日]]） - アメリカ総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]が[[江戸城]]に登城し[[徳川家定]]と会見
== Births == * [[大中]]6年（ユリウス暦[[852年]][[12月5日]]） - [[朱全忠]]、五代[[後梁]]の初代[[皇帝]]（+ [[912年]]） * [[貞享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1684年]][[11月27日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]、[[江戸幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]・5代[[紀伊藩]]主（+ [[1751年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[11月13日]]） - [[伊東マンショ]]、[[天正遣欧少年使節]]正使（* [[1569年]]?） * [[享保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1726年]][[11月14日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（* [[1676年]]） * [[文政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1818年]][[11月19日]]） - [[司馬江漢]]、[[洋画家]]（* [[1738年]]） * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[11月21日]]） - [[酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|酒井忠良]]、[[伊勢崎藩]]主（* [[1808年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|20|10|22|9|21|11|10|1021}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:赤口]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

{{Lunar October}} '''October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 21'''<!--Lunar October21 is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[11月10日]]） - [[源頼朝]]と[[源義経]]の兄弟が[[駿河国]]の黄瀬川で初めての対面{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[貞和]]元年/[[興国]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1345年]][[11月15日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[康永]]から貞和に[[改元]] * [[寛政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1800年]][[12月7日]]） - [[伊能忠敬]]が[[蝦夷地]]・[[奥州街道]]の測量を終えて江戸に帰着。12月に略測図を幕府に上呈 * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[12月7日]]） - アメリカ総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]が[[江戸城]]に登城し[[徳川家定]]と会見
== Births == * [[大中]]6年（ユリウス暦[[852年]][[12月5日]]） - [[朱全忠]]、五代[[後梁]]の初代[[皇帝]]（+ [[912年]]） * [[貞享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1684年]][[11月27日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]、[[江戸幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]・5代[[紀伊藩]]主（+ [[1751年]]）
== Deaths == * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[11月13日]]） - [[伊東マンショ]]、[[天正遣欧少年使節]]正使（* [[1569年]]?） * [[享保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1726年]][[11月14日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（* [[1676年]]） * [[文政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1818年]][[11月19日]]） - [[司馬江漢]]、[[洋画家]]（* [[1738年]]） * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[11月21日]]） - [[酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|酒井忠良]]、[[伊勢崎藩]]主（* [[1808年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|20|10|22|9|21|11|10|1021}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}}4年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}}元年/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}}6年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}}, a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}}).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.

== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}}, a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}}).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

[[sn:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}}4年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}}元年/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}}6年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}}, a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}}).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

[[sn:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}}4年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}}1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}}6年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}}, a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}}).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

[[sn:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}}4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}}1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}}6年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}}, a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}}).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}}4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}}1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}}6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}}12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}}, a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}}).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}}, a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}}).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}}, who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}}, a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

[[sn:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}}4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}}1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}}6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}}） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}}. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}}12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}}, a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}}).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}}10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}}, a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}}).

[[sn:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).

* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

[[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.text:
[[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

[[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|伊能忠敬}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).

[[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text). == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}} [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[Category:Lunar October]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Days 21 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:11]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.text:
[[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}} [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Days 21 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:New]] [[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] [[zh:十月廿一]] [[en:draft:October 21 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定}} .

* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).

* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages to be translated]] to [[Category:dates to be translated]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:dates to be translated]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
