[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories|
}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}

}}

revision.text:
[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 21 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 21 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 21 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023}}
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories|
}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Days 21 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:October 21 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] }}

* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
{{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|qq=}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|qq=}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|qq=}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|qq=}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|qq=}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|qq=}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|qq=}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|qq=}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|qq=}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|qq=}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|qq=}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|qq=}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|qq=}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|qq=}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|qq=}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|qq=}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|qq=}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|qq=}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=}} {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|qq=}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|qq=}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} {{draft categories|
|qq=}}

revision.comment: 22 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:10月21日 (旧暦) up to rev 82853455
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月21日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の21日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[治承]]4年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1180年]][[11月10日]]） - [[源頼朝]]と[[源義経]]の兄弟が[[駿河国]]の黄瀬川で初めての対面{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[貞和]]元年/[[興国]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1345年]][[11月15日]]） - [[北朝 (日本)|北朝]]が[[康永]]から貞和に[[改元]] * [[寛政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1800年]][[12月7日]]） - [[伊能忠敬]]が[[蝦夷地]]・[[奥州街道]]の測量を終えて江戸に帰着。12月に略測図を幕府に上呈 * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[12月7日]]） - アメリカ総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]が[[江戸城]]に登城し[[徳川家定]]と会見
== 誕生日 == * [[大中]]6年（ユリウス暦[[852年]][[12月5日]]） - [[朱全忠]]、五代[[後梁]]の初代[[皇帝]]（+ [[912年]]） * [[貞享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1684年]][[11月27日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]、[[江戸幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]・5代[[紀伊藩]]主（+ [[1751年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[11月13日]]） - [[伊東マンショ]]、[[天正遣欧少年使節]]正使（* [[1569年]]?） * [[享保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1726年]][[11月14日]]） - [[伏見宮邦永親王]]、[[伏見宮]]第14代当主（* [[1676年]]） * [[文政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1818年]][[11月19日]]） - [[司馬江漢]]、[[洋画家]]（* [[1738年]]） * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[11月21日]]） - [[酒井忠良 (伊勢崎藩主)|酒井忠良]]、[[伊勢崎藩]]主（* [[1808年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|20|10|22|9|21|11|10|1021}}

calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4th Harris|ja|ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .

* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).

year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский Harris|ja|ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunisolar October]] to [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|ja|徳川家定|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Genwa (Japan)|ja|元和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuki|ja|土佐光起|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Kawaoka Seishū|ja|華岡青洲|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft}} ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .

* {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaei|qq=}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/December 7|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|ja|西園寺公望|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saionji Kinmochi|qq=}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|qq=}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/December 5|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 10|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Junnin Tennō|ja|淳仁天皇|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junnin Tennō|qq=}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanbun|qq=}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 16|qq=}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenchō|ja|治承|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenchō|qq=}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian 10|ja|11月10日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 10|qq=}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoritomo|qq=}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義経|lt=Yoshiie?|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Seiwa|ja|貞和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiwa|qq=}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|ja|興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōkoku|qq=}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|ja|ユリウス暦|1=Julian calendar|2=ja|3=ユリウス暦|4=zh|5=儒略曆|6=ru|7=Юлианский_календарь|8=de|9=Julianischer_Kalender|10=es|11=Calendario juliano|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Julian 15|ja|11月15日|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November 15|qq=}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kangyō|ja|康永|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangyō|qq=}} to {{ill|Teiwa|ja|貞和|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiwa|qq=}} . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ansei|qq=}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский Iesada|ja|徳川家定|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Iesada|qq=}} .

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1345|qq=}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1617|qq=}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1691|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōreki|qq=}} 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1345|qq=}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1617|qq=}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1691|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōreki|qq=}} 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|10月21日 (旧暦)|version=82853455|comment=Imported full ja history}}
