It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1345|qq=}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .

* {{ill|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōreki|qq=}} 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=}} ).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1345|qq=}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1617|qq=}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1691|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōreki|qq=}} 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]]
{{translated page|ja|10月21日 (旧暦)|version=82853455|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1345|qq=}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1617|qq=}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1691|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōreki|qq=}} 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=}} ).

{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1180|ja|1180|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1180|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1345|qq=}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1617|qq=}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1691|qq=}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|ja|Hōreki|1=Hōreki|2=ja|3=宝暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōreki|qq=}} 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==

{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1345|ja|1345|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1345|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1617|ja|1617|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1617|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1691|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († {{ill|1691|ja|1691|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1691|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1760|ja|1760|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1760|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]]
{{translated page|ja|10月21日 (旧暦)|version=82853455|comment=Imported full ja history}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1800|ja|1800|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1800|qq=}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1817|ja|1817|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1817|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|10月21日 (旧暦)|version=82853455|comment=Imported full ja history}}

* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1849|ja|1849|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1849|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|ja|1898|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1898|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|ja|1940|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1940|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|ja|1952|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1952|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]]
{{translated page|ja|10月21日 (旧暦)|version=82853455|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840106]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]]
{{translated page|ja|10月21日 (旧暦)|version=82853455|comment=Imported full ja history}}

* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|10月21日 (旧暦)|version=82853455|comment=Imported full ja history}}

* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
