Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840106]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|qq=|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|qq=|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840106]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840106]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]]
{{translated page|ja|10月21日 (旧暦)|version=82853455|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:October 21 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 10월 21일]] [[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月廿一]]
[[ar:October 21 (Lunisolar)]]
[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿一]] {{wikidata link|Q840106}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840106]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840106]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|22|10|24|9|23|11|10|1023|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿一]][[zh:十月廿一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840106]] Wikidata name: 21st day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 21|qq=October 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Jishō|Tenchō]] 4th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] and [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Yoshiie?]] (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Seiwa]] 1st year/[[:en:Kōkoku|Kōkoku]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1345|1345]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Kōei|Kangyō]] to [[:en:Jōwa (Muromachi period)|Teiwa]] . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – U.S. Consul [[:en:Harris|Townsend Harris]] visited Edo Castle and met with [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Iesada]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genwa (Japan)]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1617|1617]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） – [[:en:Tosa Mitsuoki|Tosa Mitsuki]] , a painter († [[:en:1691|1691]] ).
* [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 10th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Hanaoka Seishū|Kawaoka Seishū]] , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († [[:en:1835|1835]] ).
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 14th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1817|1817]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († [[:en:1898|1898]] ).
* [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ） – [[:en:Saionji Kinmochi|Saionji Kinmochi]] , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († [[:en:1940|1940]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin Tennō]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|WD=Q1194671|lt=Tenchō}} 4th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|WD=Q310445|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|en|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1146143|lt=Seiwa}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|en|Kōkoku|WD=Q1143592|lt=Kōkoku}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1345|en|1345|WD=Q6077|lt=1345}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15}} ） – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kōei|en|Kōei|WD=Q980266|lt=Kangyō}} to {{ill|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|en|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1146143|lt=Teiwa}} . * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1800|en|1800|WD=Q6875|lt=1800}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ） – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ） – U.S. Consul {{ill|Harris|en|Harris|WD=Q226548|lt=Townsend Harris}} visited Edo Castle and met with {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|en|Tokugawa Iesada|WD=Q336383|lt=Tokugawa Iesada}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genwa (Japan)}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1617|en|1617|WD=Q6798|lt=1617}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}} ） – {{ill|Tosa Mitsuoki|en|Tosa Mitsuoki|WD=Q3180225|lt=Tosa Mitsuki}} , a painter († {{ill|1691|en|1691|WD=Q7682|lt=1691}} ).
* {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki}} 10th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1760|en|1760|WD=Q7646|lt=1760}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Hanaoka Seishū|en|Hanaoka Seishū|WD=Q1376935|lt=Kawaoka Seishū}} , a physician and pioneer of anesthesia († {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835}} ).
* {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1817|en|1817|WD=Q6958|lt=1817}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1849|en|1849|WD=Q7650|lt=1849}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ） – {{ill|Saionji Kinmochi|en|Saionji Kinmochi|WD=Q297628|lt=Saionji Kinmochi}} , who served as Prime Minister on the 12th and 14th occasions and was a genrō († {{ill|1940|en|1940|WD=Q18633|lt=1940}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 5|en|December 5|WD=Q2300|lt=December 5}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|en|1952|WD=Q5272|lt=1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|765|en|765|WD=Q31216|lt=765}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10}} ） – {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Junnin Tennō}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1669|en|1669|WD=Q7602|lt=1669}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief († – as noted in the text).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .

10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|WD=Q310445|lt=Yoshiie?}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|en|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1146143|lt=Seiwa}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|en|Kōkoku|WD=Q1143592|lt=Kōkoku}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 14th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1817|en|1817|WD=Q6958|lt=1817}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Ono Yūgorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Yūgorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6463981}} , a mathematician († {{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898}} ).

* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|December 5|en|December 5|WD=Q2300|lt=December 5}} ） – {{ill|Doi Bansui|ja|土井晩翠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Bansui|1=Bansui Doi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1234919}} , a poet († {{ill|1952|en|1952|WD=Q5272|lt=1952}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .

{{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180|1=1180}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10|1=November 10}} ） – A historic meeting took place in which brothers {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|WD=Q310445|lt=Yoshiie?|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} (the text reads “実朝” but context suggests a name change) met for the first time on the banks of the Kise River in Suruga. * {{ill|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|en|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1146143|lt=Seiwa|1=Jōwa (Muromachi period)}} 1st year/{{ill|Kōkoku|en|Kōkoku|WD=Q1143592|lt=Kōkoku|1=Kōkoku}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} finished surveying Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō and returned to Edo, presenting his draft map to the shogunate in December. *
